indication: TAFINLAR is indicated, in combination with trametinib, for the treatment of patients with metastatic non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) with BRAF V600E mutation as detected by an FDA-approved test.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to dabrafenib in combination with trametinib for the treatment of patients with metastatic non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) with BRAF V600E mutation, as detected by an FDA-approved test.

document.name: Tafinlar (dabrafenib) [package insert]. FDA.
